reason: Testing bar + review checklist: integration apply/status tests for safe apply, partial failure, host-owned text preservation around OMV managed blocks, and the cargo fmt/clippy/test gates this task must pass.

Verify finalize-boundary stays a Trellis capability while target set is selection-gated; integrations.toml remains desired-state truth; managed-block identifier convention honored; backend design-decision note updated if needed.
Confirm partial/mismatch and missing-entrypoint paths return stable reason codes + localized messages via the structured JSON failure contract.
Confirm any new status/failure copy is catalog-driven with en-US/zh-CN parity, no hardcoded operator strings.
Verify the implemented agent->entrypoint mapping and idempotent injection match the confirmed distribution model, and codex-only behavior is unchanged.
